# OSLDisposeTokenUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `OSLDisposeTokenProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias OSLDisposeTokenUPP = OSLDisposeTokenProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of a dispose token callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/osldisposetokenprocptr].
title: OSLDisposeTokenUPP
